checklistName: Multi Device Manual Operation Unification Checklist
updatePolicy: manual git pull from private repository

devices.name: Company PC
devices.role: Implementation, commit, push, and PR creation center
primaryActions: Start work from main with git switch main
Update with git pull origin main before implementation
Confirm git status before work and before handoff
Implement, test, commit, then push only when the owner decides
checks: No .bat/.ps1/.cmd/.exe launch or update files added
private-local.html remains the manual launch entry
Private repository and local-first operation remain unchanged

devices.name: Home PC
primaryActions: Run git switch main after merge
Run git pull origin main manually
Run git status and confirm working tree clean
checks: No automatic updater or launcher is used
Norton or security software detections are not force allowed

devices.name: iPad
devices.role: Private repository browsing and visual confirmation
primaryActions: Use the GitHub app or browser to view the private repository
Confirm README and index.html changes from the private repository
Use iPad for browsing confirmation, not local script execution
checks: No launcher or executable operation is needed
Private repository access remains the review path

postMergeUpdateSteps.label: On Home PC, switch to main after merge.
Pull the merged private repository main branch.

prohibitedActions.label: Do not use automatic update launchers.
Do not make GitHub Pages required.

securitySoftwareResponse.label: If Norton blocks a file, do not force allow it.
Do not reuse files blocked by Norton or other security software.
Do not override security software to continue operation.

operationPrinciples: Company PC is the center for implementation, commit, push, and PR creation.
Home PC confirms merged main by manual git pull and manual private-local.html launch.
iPad confirms the private repository through the GitHub app or browser.
Private repository, local first, and no GitHub Pages dependency remain the operating premise.
nextRecommendedStep: Use Company PC for implementation workflow, Home PC for post-merge git pull confirmation, and iPad for private repository browsing confirmation.
